title: British-Style Steamed Pudding with Malt Sauce
description: A classic British dessert made with steamed pudding and a rich malt sauce. This comforting treat is perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: Malty flour
ingredients.notes: Use a gluten-free option if needed

instructions: 1. Preheat the steamer to the highest setting.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the malty flour, light brown sugar, and British tea.
3. Add the pudding mix and milk to the bowl, and mix until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased pudding basin or a heatproof bowl.
5. Place the pudding in the steamer, cover with a lid, and steam for 2 hours.
6. Remove the pudding from the steamer and let it cool for a few minutes.
7. Serve the pudding with a rich malt sauce, made by simmering the turkey neck in water to make a flavorful stock, then mixing in a small amount of malt syrup and a splash of cream.
8. Enjoy your delicious British-style steamed pudding!
